description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with exaggeratedly elongated and distorted arms that extend far beyond the body, curving outward in an unnatural manner. The figure has a bald head, a neutral facial expression, and is dressed in a short-sleeve shirt and fitted pants. The shirt appears to have a collar and is tucked into the pants, which are slim-fitting and end above the ankles. The shoes are simple and slip-on, with a rounded toe. The overall proportions of the body are highly irregular, especially the arms, which are much longer than typical human anatomy. The figure's posture is upright, but the arms' extreme extension gives it a surreal and abstract appearance.
description: A bald adult male figure with extremely elongated, twisted arms, wearing a short-sleeve shirt, fitted pants, and slip-on shoes. The body is upright but the arms are highly distorted, creating a surreal look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bald head, neutral face, and both arms dramatically extended outward and bent, with the shirt and pants clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme backward extension of the left arm and the profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and the arms curving widely around the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm stretched backward and the side profile of the figure's face and body.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward and backward
